feed.title: Surjit Singh | Software Engineer
feed.subtitle: Personal portfolio of a senior software engineer showcasing AI infrastructure, authentication platforms, and distributed systems.

entry.title: Welcome to My Portfolio
entry.content: Welcome! This site showcases my work in AI infrastructure, authentication platforms, and backend systems. Feel free to explore the projects, read the blog, or download my resume.
entry.summary: An introduction to my new personal portfolio website built with Jekyll.
